sections.paragraph:
-(I.) a thorn (from the root צָנַן No. I.), pl. צִנִּים Pro 22:5, used of hedges made of thorns, Job 5:5 but צִנֹּות is used figuratively of hooks, compare חֹוחַ Amo 4:2.

(II.) a shield (from the root צָנַן No. II.), of a larger kind, covering the whole of the soldier, θυρεός (see 1Ki 10:16), Psa 35:2 91:4 Eze 23:24.

(III.) cooling, refreshment, Pro 25:13, from the root צָנַן No. III.
